name: Stolt-Nielsen Ltd. Registered S
summary: Stolt-Nielsen Limited is a global provider of integrated transportation solutions for specialty liquids, notably chemicals, edible oils, acids, and other liquid products. Headquartered in London, the company operates through three main business areas: Stolt Tankers, Stolt Terminals, and Stolt Sea Farm. They manage a fleet of chemical tankers, operate terminals, and are involved in fish farming.
